Container.Name: ripuz
Container.Overview: Qobuz → Picard → Plex/Roon music downloader. Downloads at max FLAC quality, tags with MusicBrainz Picard, and files into Artist/Album/song.FLAC structure.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Ripuz web interface

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Ripuz config, database, and qobuz-dl credentials

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Scratch space for in-progress downloads (can be fast/cache drive)

Config.Name: Music Library
Config.Description: Your Music library root — files land here as Artist/Album/song.FLAC

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID to run as (UNRAID nobody = 99)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID to run as (UNRAID users = 100)

Config.Name: Basic Auth User
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth username (set RIPUZ_AUTH_PASS to enable)

Config.Name: Basic Auth Pass
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password (leave empty to disable)

Config.Name: Picard Timeout
Config.Description: Seconds to wait for Picard to tag a batch (600 = 10 min)
